title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.409 - Surface and ground water monitoring program, duties of department, purpose
text:
640.409.  Surface and ground water monitoring program, duties of department, purpose. — The department shall establish, develop and maintain an ongoing statewide surface and groundwater monitoring program, the purposes of which are:
  (1)  Determination of ambient surface and groundwater quality for use as background or baseline water quality data;
  (2)  Detection of trends in the character and concentration of contaminants in surface and groundwater resources; and
  (3)  Identification of areas highly vulnerable to contamination.
(L. 1989 S.B. 112, et al. § 4)
